title: Blast radius
noDownstream: {count} changed symbol(s), no downstream callers found.
noCallersForSymbol: No downstream callers found for this symbol.
empty: No changed symbols were detected for this pull request.
error: Couldn't load the blast radius for this pull request.

degraded.partial: The repository index is partial — some downstream callers may be missing.
degraded.degraded: The repository index is degraded — results may be incomplete.
degraded.failed: The repository index could not be read — blast radius may be inaccurate.
